name: Bitcoin
rationale: BTC is the best tactical long right now: the state feed shows positive 1W and 1M momentum, and price is above the 20-day average, while recent macro has turned a bit friendlier as Reuters reported the dollar near a one-month low after softer inflation reinforced expectations that the Fed can stay patient.
